rows = read "sales.csv" | lines | skip 1 | map (split ",")
best = group {it[0]} rows | items | map {p -> {k: p.k, v: p.v | map {num it[1]} | sum}} | top 1
print "{best[0].k} {best[0].v}"

import csv

totals = {}
with open("sales.csv", newline="") as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    for row in reader:
        region = row["region"]
        amount = float(row["amount"])
        totals[region] = totals.get(region, 0) + amount

top_region = max(totals, key=totals.get)
top_total = totals[top_region]
if top_total == int(top_total):
    top_total = int(top_total)

print(top_region, top_total)

import csv

totals = {}
with open("sales.csv", newline="") as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    for row in reader:
        region = row["region"]
        amount = float(row["amount"])
        totals[region] = totals.get(region, 0) + amount

top_region = max(totals, key=totals.get)
top_total = totals[top_region]
if top_total == int(top_total):
    top_total = int(top_total)

print(top_region, top_total)

users = json (read "users.json")
print (tojson (users | map {u -> {name: "{u.first} {u.last}"}}))

import json

with open("users.json", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    users = json.load(f)

result = [{"name": f"{u['first']} {u['last']}"} for u in users]

print(json.dumps(result, separators=(",", ":")))

with open("log.txt", "r") as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

error_lines = [line.rstrip("\n") for line in lines if "ERROR" in line]

print(len(error_lines))
if error_lines:
    print(error_lines[-1])
